name: Pasta Twists with Asparagus Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Asparagus tips and tender pieces (1") steamed
12 ounces Pasta cooked according to directions
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in olive oil over low heat.
2. Gently sauté the asparagus tips until tender. Remove from the pan and set aside.
3. Add flour to the pan and stir well.
4. Gradually add half-and-half, stirring continuously to avoid lumps.
5. Crush the flavor cube into small pieces and add it to the mixture.
6. Mix thoroughly and season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Return the sautéed asparagus tips to the pan and mix well.
8. Cook the pasta according to package directions until al dente, then drain.
9. Serve the sauce over hot pasta and top with grated cheese.
